text:
(a) Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the department may issue a title for a trailer or semitrailer that has a gross vehicle weight of 4,000 pounds or less if all other requirements for issuance of a title are met.

(b) To obtain a title under this section, the owner of the trailer or semitrailer must:

(1) apply for the title in the manner required by Section 501.023 (Application for Title) ; and

(2) pay the fee required by Section 501.138 (Collection and Disposition of Fees) .

(c) A subsequent purchaser of a trailer or semitrailer titled previously under this section or in another jurisdiction must obtain a title under this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.037 — Title for Trailers or Semitrailers

(a) Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the department may issue a title for a trailer or semitrailer that has a gross vehicle weight of 4,000 pounds or less if all other requirements for issuance of a title are met.

(b) To obtain a title under this section, the owner of the trailer or semitrailer must:

    (1) apply for the title in the manner required by Section 501.023 (Application for Title) ; and

    (2) pay the fee required by Section 501.138 (Collection and Disposition of Fees) .

(c) A subsequent purchaser of a trailer or semitrailer titled previously under this section or in another jurisdiction must obtain a title under this section.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 13, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: b

apply for the title in the manner required by Section 501.023 (Application for Title) ; and
pay the fee required by Section 501.138 (Collection and Disposition of Fees) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A subsequent purchaser of a trailer or semitrailer titled previously under this section or in another jurisdiction must obtain a title under this section.
